ai_coding_tools.name: Lovable
ai_coding_tools.notes: Quick prototypes only. GitHub sync + ZIP export. Supabase for data. Do not use for anything touching student data.

ai_coding_tools.name: Replit Agent
ai_coding_tools.notes: Good for internal tools. Data residency not confirmed for UK GDPR compliance on student data.

ai_coding_tools.name: Bolt.new
ai_coding_tools.notes: Fast prototyping. Built-in PostgreSQL + Supabase since V2. Green builds only (platform maturity still being evaluated).

ai_coding_tools.name: Cursor
ai_coding_tools.notes: Full code control, approved by engineering. Preferred for Orange and Red builds.

ai_coding_tools.name: Claude Code
ai_coding_tools.notes: Full code control, CLI-based. Approved for all paths including student-facing features.

ai_coding_tools.name: GitHub Copilot
ai_coding_tools.notes: IDE-integrated code assistant. Code suggestions must be reviewed before committing.

ai_coding_tools.name: ChatGPT / Claude (chat)
ai_coding_tools.notes: Never paste real student data, employer contracts, or financial information into chat interfaces.

other_services.name: Vercel
other_services.notes: Preferred for frontend deployments. Red builds require additional security review.

other_services.name: Supabase
other_services.approved_for: All build paths (with review for Red)
other_services.notes: Row-level security must be enabled for any student data tables.

other_services.name: OpenAI API
other_services.notes: Must not send raw student PII. Use anonymised or aggregated data only.

other_services.name: Anthropic API
other_services.notes: Same data handling rules as OpenAI. Preferred for the Interview Skills Coach.

other_services.name: Google Analytics
other_services.notes: Not approved for tools serving students under 18. Use privacy-respecting alternatives for student-facing tools.

other_services.name: PostHog
other_services.notes: Self-hosted option available. Approved for student-facing with anonymised tracking.

other_services.name: Segment
other_services.notes: Do not route student PII through Segment.

not_approved.name: Notion AI
not_approved.reason: Under re-evaluation — DPA with UK SCCs now published (March 2026). Content moderation controls for under-18 use still unconfirmed.

not_approved.name: Jasper
not_approved.reason: Marketing-focused, no controls for age-appropriate content generation

not_approved.name: Midjourney
not_approved.reason: Restricted enterprise API now available. No content moderation controls suitable for educational context.

request_process: Post in #tools-and-tech Slack channel with: tool name, intended use, build path, and whether it will touch student data. Engineering Lead reviews within 5 business days.
